_description: Golden fixture for the AtlasCloud video-generation round-trip eval (ROADMAP G3). One short image-to-video job (Kling) so a run stays ~$0.50–1. Asserts a completed prediction returns a well-formed video URL — not a stuck/failed one.
_durationSec_note: Intentionally 2 — an INVALID raw Kling duration (the API rejects 'duration value 2 is invalid'). This is the regression test for atlascloud.ts snapDuration(): the product must snap 2 → nearest valid Kling duration (5) so the submit succeeds. Do NOT 'fix' this to 5 — that would delete the test that proves the snap works.
